description: Coverage-denominator decision for this subproject. The coverage gate requires 'expanded' or 'deferred-by-owner' with a receipt.
receipt: Owner decision (Patrick Freeland, 2026-07-21): this subproject uses the 43-Nation NWTEC WA/OR/ID denominator (sources/nations.json, version 2026-07-21-nwtec-43). ATNI-roster expansion moves to DS-6 maintenance / a future iteration.
